summary: Code review completed. Found 2 critical security issues and missing test coverage. PR is not ready for merge.

findings.title: SQL injection vulnerability in payment query builder
findings.detail: String concatenation used instead of parameterized queries at line 145 of queryBuilder.ts

findings.title: Sensitive payment data logged in plain text
findings.detail: Credit card numbers and CVV codes are logged without redaction

findings.title: Missing test coverage for payment validation
findings.detail: No unit tests found for edge cases in payment amount validation logic

recommendations.action: Fix SQL injection vulnerability before merge
Remove or redact sensitive data from logs
Add unit tests for payment validation edge cases
Schedule security team review after fixes

open_questions: Should we require PCI DSS certification before this module goes to production?

assumptions: All payment-related code is in src/api/payments directory
approvals_required: Security team must review before merge
